summary: PR contains 2 critical security issues and missing test coverage for new payment validation logic

critical_findings.description: SQL injection vulnerability in payment query builder
critical_findings.suggested_fix: Use parameterized queries instead of string concatenation

critical_findings.description: Sensitive payment data logged in plain text
critical_findings.suggested_fix: Remove logging or redact sensitive fields (card number, CVV)

high_findings.description: Error handling may cause transaction to proceed despite validation failure
high_findings.suggested_fix: Add explicit return after validation error

medium_findings.description: Magic numbers used for payment limits without constants

missing_tests.description: No tests for payment amount validation edge cases
No integration tests for complete payment flow

requirement_gaps.description: PR does not implement currency conversion requirement
requirement_gaps.acceptance_criteria: System must support USD, EUR, GBP conversions
